title: Vanilla Medley
description: A peppery, dense mediterranean-friendly dish featuring vanilla sugar and steam-cooked flavors, designed to be a crowd-pleaser for special occasions or as an indulgent dessert.
instructions: Toast the coconut flakes in a dry pan until golden brown.
In a mixing bowl, combine almond meal and vanilla sugar. Add toasted coconut flakes, fresh basil leaves, and a pinch of salt.
Press mixture firmly into a small square baking dish lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15 minutes or until firm and lightly golden on top.
Cool completely before slicing. Serve cold as a dessert accompaniment.
